## Description

A brief summary of the changes in this PR and the motivation behind them.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation update
- [ ] Dependency update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Include relevant details such as test configuration, operating system, and steps to reproduce.

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual testing on macOS
- [ ] Manual testing on Windows

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] My code follows the project's code conventions and dependency flow rules.
- [ ] I have added tests that cover my changes.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`pnpm test`).
- [ ] The project builds without errors (`pnpm build`).
- [ ] There are no linter warnings (`pnpm lint`).
- [ ] I have updated translations in all locale files if I added user-facing strings.
- [ ] I have updated documentation if my changes affect the public API or user-facing behavior.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
